title: Losing My Phone in the City
content: While walking through a crowded shopping district, Lily suddenly realized her phone was missing. She immediately checked her bag and coat pockets several times, but it was nowhere to be found. Panic quickly replaced her relaxed mood because her phone contained important photos, contacts, and banking applications. Lily retraced her steps through busy streets, cafés, and stores she had visited earlier that afternoon. Just as she was about to give up hope, a bookstore employee approached her holding the phone. Someone had found it near the entrance and turned it in. Lily thanked the employee repeatedly and felt incredibly relieved. Afterward, she decided to buy a phone case with a stronger strap.
